headline: Nothing's good-looking Watch 3 Pro smartwatch is just $69
summary: The CMF by Nothing Watch 3 Pro, a budget smartwatch, is currently on sale. It features a 1.43-inch OLED display and is available for $69 on Amazon. This deal makes an already affordable smartwatch even cheaper.

headline: Windows 11's big patch Tuesday allows you to hold off on updates for longer
summary: Microsoft's latest Windows 11 patch Tuesday offers significant improvements. Users can now pause updates for up to 35 days. This feature was previously rolled out to Windows Insiders.

headline: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year
summary: OpenAI is reportedly developing its first hardware device: a smart speaker. The device will allow users to converse with ChatGPT without a screen. It's expected to feature a camera and sensors to understand its environment.

headline: SpaceXAI's Grok programming tool was uploading its users' entire codebase to cloud storage
summary: SpaceXAI's Grok Build AI coding tool was found uploading full user codebases to Google Cloud. This occurred even with files explicitly marked for exclusion. The company has since disabled the problematic feature.

headline: Dead Space Creator Glen Schofield Announces Retirement From Gaming Industry
summary: Glen Schofield, known for creating the Dead Space series, has retired. His departure marks the end of a significant career in gaming. The industry bids farewell to a celebrated figure.

headline: Halo Studios Reportedly Cancels New Multiplayer Project
summary: Sources indicate that a new Halo multiplayer game has been scrapped. This cancellation impacts the future of the popular franchise. Details surrounding the project's demise are scarce.

headline: Far Cry TV Series Casts Steve Buscemi in Mystery Role
summary: Acclaimed actor Steve Buscemi is joining the FX Far Cry TV series. His role in the adaptation remains a mystery. Fans anticipate his performance in the gaming-inspired show.

headline: Blue Beetle to Return in Superman Sequel Man of Tomorrow
summary: Blue Beetle will make a comeback in the Superman sequel, Man of Tomorrow. Xolo Maridueña is set to reprise his role as the character. This marks his return after the 2023 Blue Beetle film.

headline: Police say Ann Widdecombe killed in 'targeted attack' as motive investigated
summary: Ann Widdecombe was reportedly killed in a "targeted attack." Counter-terror police are investigating the motive behind the incident. A 28-year-old suspect has been detained for up to seven days.

headline: Trump scraps threat of 20% fee on Hormuz cargo as US resumes blockade of Iran ports
summary: Trump has rescinded a recent threat of a 20% fee on Strait of Hormuz cargo. The US is resuming its blockade of Iranian ports. This ongoing conflict aims to break Iran's control over the waterway.

headline: Starmer and Burnham hail Hillsborough Law as MPs give approval
summary: The Hillsborough Law has received parliamentary approval. Sir Keir Starmer and Andy Burnham praised the legislation. This marks a significant moment in Starmer's final days as prime minister.

headline: Midnight social media curfew proposed for older UK teens
summary: A midnight social media curfew is proposed for older UK teenagers. Teens will have the option to opt out of these restrictions. Campaigners have criticized the proposals as insufficient.
